prestazioni: F4R RS 2.0L (F4R730) engine: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with 1.06 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and flow

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the R26's MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension, including spherical bearing top mounts (SuperPro) and adjustable camber plates (Vogtland)

AP Racing CP6640-1000 front brake kit with 355mm 2-piece rotors, 6-piston calipers, and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom stainless steel braided brake line setup (Goodridge) and Motul RBF660 brake fluid
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (R26-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler, including custom 3D-printed ABS wheel arches for aggressive stance with 9.5x18 ET20 (front) and 10.5x18 ET25 (rear) Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels
Full custom carbon fiber aero package including a front splitter (Seibon), side skirts (VIS Racing), and a rear diffuser (AIT Racing), all painted in Renault Sport Blue (B64) with matte clear coat

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (R26-specific mounting brackets), custom Alcantara door cards (Sparco), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub (NRG Innovations), paired with a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK) in 4130 chromoly
